name: profile: react.yaml resolution byte-identical across two runs (deterministic per §2.5 resolution_order)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/profiles/resolve.sh" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/profiles/react.yaml" --emit-resolved 2>r1.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/profiles/resolve.sh" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/profiles/react.yaml" --emit-resolved 2>r2.json && diff r1.json r2.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
